prompt: A realistic vertical smartphone screenshot of a Chinese livestream interface showing a young woman streamer seated in a cozy dorm room bedroom, front-facing medium close-up selfie composition from chest to head. Her face is intentionally obscured by a large soft rectangular blur centered over the face. She has dark messy black-brown hair in a loose high bun with wispy strands falling around the cheeks, and a small light-colored butterfly hair clip on the left side. She wears a fitted white scoop-neck long-sleeve top layered over delicate lace trim and a thin necklace with a small pendant. Her right hand supports her chin in a casual cute pose, and the mood is soft, intimate, and everyday. The room behind her is a feminine student dorm interior with a loft bed at upper right, white curtains printed with simple blue cartoon characters and stars, a desk with bottles and small items, a wooden chair draped with a pink towel, shelving on the left with plush toys, cosmetics, and bags, and warm indoor ambient lighting. Add full livestream app UI overlays in Chinese across the image, designed like a real mobile live-broadcast app screenshot. Top status bar: time 21:15 at top left, mobile signal, 5G, and battery 68 at top right. Top creator area: a circular avatar, the streamer name 叮当猫, a red follow button labeled 关注, and a popularity line reading 10万+本场点赞. Add a small ranking badge reading 小时榜第3名. Near the top center-right, include exactly 3 small circular user avatars. At the upper right, add a dark rounded popularity pill reading 10万+, a close X icon, a purple button labeled 更多直播, and a gift progress card reading 礼物展馆 0/24 with a blue tag 经典. Left lower-mid floating gift banner: sender avatar and text 星辰大海 送小心心 with a pink heart icon and x1. Comment area on lower left: exactly 6 stacked translucent chat bubbles with these lines in order: 1. 萌萌小熊：主播今天好美呀～ 2. 小太阳：声音好好听，姐姐是哪里人呀？ 3. 芝士奶盖：主播在干嘛呢～ 4. 糖炒栗子：可以唱首歌吗～ 5. 嘴当的猫猫头：主播好可爱！ 6. 好运连连：关注了主播. Add small blue diamond level badges before the last three comments with the numbers 6, 10, and 21. Bottom input bar: a rounded translucent text field with placeholder 说点什么..., then 4 controls to the right: a smiley icon, a glowing pink heart gift icon, a pink present icon, and a gray three-dots icon. Photorealistic phone capture style, natural skin and fabric texture, mild beauty-camera softness, realistic app overlay transparency, vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.
